zh.Merton Manor, Great Torrington, Devonshi: 英國英格蘭戴文格亞特 托林頓
zh.of Great Torrington, Devonshire, England: 英國英格蘭戴文格亞特 托林頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Henry de Merton於1195年出生在英國英格蘭戴文格亞特 托林頓時，他的父親Sir Robert de Merton40歲，母親Emma de Toriton38歲。他於1228年與Mrs. Henry De Merton在英國英格蘭戴文格亞特 托林頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1246年在他的家鄉享年51歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Merton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the many places called Merton, such as found in Surrey, Kent, Devon, Oxfordshire, and Norfolk. The placename derives from Old English mere ‘pool’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. There has probably been some confusion with both Marton and Murton .

variants.name: Marton
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Laszlo, Antal, Arpad, Geza, Andras, Bela, Denes, Endre, Gaza, Imre, Istvan, Janos.

English: habitational name from any of several places so called, principally in Lincolnshire, Warwickshire, and North Yorkshire, named in Old English as ‘settlement by a lake’ (from mere or mær ‘pool, lake’ + tūn ‘settlement’) or as ‘settlement by a boundary’ (from (ge)mære ‘boundary’ + tūn ‘settlement’). Compare Martin 2.
Hungarian (Márton): from the personal name Márton (see Martin 1). This surname is also found in Romania; see also 3 below.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Henry de Merton was born in 1195, in Great Torrington, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Robert de Merton, was 40 and his mother, Emma de Toriton, was 38. He married Mrs. Henry De Merton in 1228, in Great Torrington, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1246, in his hometown, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Henry de Merton est né en 1195, à Great Torrington, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert de Merton, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Emma de Toriton, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. Henry De Merton en 1228, à Great Torrington, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1246, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Henry de Mertonが1195年にイギリスイギリスデボングレアト トリントンで生まれた時，父Sir Robert de Mertonは40歳，母Emma de Toritonは38歳であった。1228年にイギリスイギリスデボングレアト トリントンでMrs. Henry De Mertonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1246年に故郷で51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Henry de Merton(이)가 1195년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 그리트 토링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert de Merton(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma de Toriton(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1228년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 그리트 토링턴에서 Mrs. Henry De Merton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1246년 그의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Henry de Merton родился в 1195 г. в местности грит торрингтон, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Robert de Merton было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma de Toriton, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Henry De Merton в 1228 г. в местности грит торрингтон, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1246 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 51 год.
